user.title: AstraMeter
user.description: Emulate a smart meter for Marstek batteries. Pick the device type and the Home Assistant sensor(s) that report grid power.

data.pair_mode: Subtract an import/export entity pair instead

data_description.marstek_mailbox: Provide your Marstek app login to register the emulated CT in your account and, if an MQTT broker is configured in Home Assistant, answer Marstek-app polls so Hame Relay can forward data to the cloud. Only needed once; leave blank to skip.

pair.title: Import / export pair
pair.description: Grid power is computed as input minus output, per matching pair.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure grid source
reconfigure.description: Change which Home Assistant sensor(s) report grid power. The device type and UDP port stay the same.

error.no_grid_entities: Select at least one grid power sensor.
error.pair_mismatch: Provide an equal, non-empty number of input and output sensors.

abort.already_configured: A meter on this UDP port is already configured.

port_in_use.title: AstraMeter could not bind its UDP port
port_in_use.description: AstraMeter could not bind UDP port {port}. Another process (for example the AstraMeter add-on) may already be using it. Free the port and reload the integration.
